description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the garland/aws-cli-docker Docker image, sets the AWS_DEFAULT_REGION variable to us-east-2, and defines a single deploy stage. Add a job named s3-branch-deployment in the deploy stage that retries up to 2 times and runs the command aws s3 sync . s3://frontend.flatiron-dc.com/$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME/ --delete --grants read=uri=http://acs.amazonaws.com/groups/global/AllUsers --exclude \"*.git/*\" to sync the repository to the S3 bucket. The job has no caches, artifacts, or rules.
